details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all rubric requirements: (1) New provider package at packages/pixelart with proper package.json and structure; (2) createPixelArt factory function correctly exported; (3) PixelArtProvider interface with image() and imageModel() methods; (4) PixelArtImageModel class implementing ImageModelV3 with doGenerate() method (correct for SDK v3 spec, though rubric mentioned 'generateImage'); (5) Image settings with size parameter and style enum ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit') plus pixelDensity (1-64); (6) Base URL correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1'; (7) Comprehensive package structure following existing SDK providers with tsconfig, vitest, tsup, turbo configs, error handling, validation schemas, and unit tests; (8) No existing provider packages modified, only new files created. Minor: tsconfig.json monorepo reference added appropriately. Implementation includes comprehensive tests, warning system for unsupported features, proper metadata handling, and TypeScript types.
